<!----><!--2021-09-03 00:10:00-->
Intro: ***Eb Eb Ebmaj/G Ebmaj/Bb | Cm7 Ebmaj/Bb***  
      ***Eb Eb Ebmaj/G Ebmaj | Cm7 Bbadd11***  

   ***Eb                    Ebmaj      Cm7 Ebmaj/Bb***  
When you try your best but you don’t succeed.  
    ***Eb                     Ebmaj          Cm7 Ebmaj/Bb***  
When you get what you want, but not what you need.  
   ***Eb                 Ebmaj        Cm7 Ebmaj/Bb***  
When you feel so tired that you can’t sleep,  
     ***Eb Ebmaj Cm7 Ebmaj/Bb***  
Stuck in reverse.  

And the tears come streaming down your face.  
When you lose something you can’t replace.  
When you love someone but it goes to waste,  
      ***Eb Ebmaj Cm7 Bbadd11***  
Could it be worse?  

Chorus:  
 ***Abmaj9      Eb/G Bbsus4 Bb***  
    Lights will guide  
        ***Abmaj9***  
    You home  
        ***Eb/G Bbsus4 Bb***  
    And ignite  
         ***Abmaj9***  
    Your bones,  
          ***Eb/G Bbsus4 Bb***  
    And I will try  
    To fix you.  

Instrumental: ***Eb Eb Ebmaj/G Ebmaj/Bb | Cm7 Ebmaj/Bb***  
             ***Eb Eb Ebmaj/G Ebmaj | Cm7 Bbadd11***  

And high up above or down below,  
When you’re too in love to let it go.  
But if you never try you'll never know  
Just what you’re worth.  

Chorus:  
    Lights will guide  
    You home  
    And ignite  
    Your bones,  
    And I will try  
    To fix you.  

Instrumental: ***Eb | Ab | Eb | Bbsus4 Bbadd11 Bbadd11 Bbadd11***  } 4 times  

    ***Eb            Ab***  
  Tears stream down your face  
    ***Eb         Bbsus4 Bbadd11***  
  When you lose something you cannot replace.  
     ***Cm7           Ab***  
  Tears stream down your face  
      ***Eb Bbadd11***  
  And I…  

    ***Eb            Ab***  
  Tears stream down your face  
    ***Eb                     Gm7***  
  I promise you I will learn from my mistakes.  
    ***Cm7           Ab***  
  Tears stream down your face  
      ***Eb Bbadd11***  
  And I…  

Chorus:  
 ***Ab        Eb/G Bbsus4 Bb***  
    Lights will guide  
        ***Ab***  
    You home  
        ***Eb/G Bbsus4 Bb***  
    And ignite  
         ***Ab***  
    Your bones,  
          ***Eb/G Bbsus4 Bb***  
    And I will try  
           ***Eb***  
    To fix you.<!--n:Fix You:s:0:e:2981-->

Intro: ***Dm | G | Am | Am Em7***  
      ***Dm Dm Dm C | G | Am7 | Am7 Em7***  
      ***Dm Dm Dm C/D | G | Am7 | Am7 Am7 Cmaj G6***  } 2 times  

***Dm7       C     G***  
Turn your magic on.  
   ***Am7***  
Umi she’d say,  
     ***Cmaj   G6 Dm7***  
Everything you want’s a dream away.  
   ***C      G             Am7***  
And we are legends every day  
     ***Cmaj G6 Dm7***  
That’s what she told me.  

  ***C     G***  
Turn your magic on,  
     ***Am7***  
To me she’d say.  
     ***Cmaj   G6 Dm7***  
Everything you want’s a dream away.  
 ***C        G                    Am7***  
Under this pressure, under this weight  
We are diamonds.  

Chorus:  
       ***Cmaj G6  Dm7      C***  
    Now I feel my heart beating,  
       ***G            Am7***  
    I feel my heart underneath my skin.  
          ***Cmaj G6  Dm7***  
    And I feel my heart beating,  
     ***G                  Am7***  
    Oh, you make me feel  
        ***Em7    Dm***  
    Like I’m alive again.  

Instrumental: ***Dm Dm Dm C/D | G | Am7***  

    ***Am7 Cmaj G6 Dm  C***  
    Alive again.  
    ***G           Am7***  
    Oh, you make me feel  
        ***Cmaj G6 Dm7***  
    Like I’m alive again.  

  ***C        G***  
Said I can’t go on,  
      ***Am***  
Not in this way,  
       ***Cmaj     G6 Dm7***  
I’m a dream that died by light of day.  
     ***C       G                Am7***  
Gonna hold up half the sky and say  
Only I own me.  

Chorus:  
       ***Cmaj G6  Dm7      C***  
    Now I feel my heart beating,  
          ***G            Am7***  
    I feel my heart underneath my skin.  
          ***Cmaj G6  Dm7***  
    Oh, I can feel my heart beating  
      ***G                     Am7***  
    ’Cause you make me feel  
           ***Cmaj G6 Dm***  
    Like I’m alive again.

    ***Am7 Cmaj G6 Dm  C***

    ***G                  Am7***

     ***Am***

Intro: ***Dm7 | Bb | F | Fsus2***  } 2 times  
  
  ***Dm7          Bb                F***  
Come up to meet you, tell you I’m sorry,  
           ***Fsus2      Dm7***  
You don’t know how lovely you are.  
       ***Bb                    F***  
I had to find you, tell you I need you,  
        ***Fsus2    C/F Dm7***  
And tell you I’ll set you apart.  

       ***Bb                        F***  
Tell me your secrets and ask me your questions,  
        ***Fsus2     C/F Dm7***  
Oh, let’s go back to the start.  
      ***Bb                 F***  
Running in circles, coming in tails,  
         ***Fsus2 C/F Bb***  
Heads are a science apart.  

Chorus:  
  
    ***Bb            F***  
  Nobody said it was easy.  
    ***Fsus2          Bb***  
  It’s such a shame for us to part,  
           ***F***  
  Nobody said it was easy.  
    ***C/F           Fsus2    C***  
  Noone ever said it would be this hard.  
    ***C/G              F***  
  Oh, take me back to the start.  

Instrumental: ***F | Bb | F | F | Dm7 | Bb | F | Fsus2***  

I was just guessing at numbers and figures  
Pulling the puzzles apart.  
Questions of science, science and progress  
Do not speak as loud as my heart.  

Tell me you love me, and come back and haunt me,  
Oh, when I rush to the start  
Running in circles, chasing tails  
Coming aback as we are.  

Chorus:  
     Nobody said it was easy.  
     Oh, it’s such a shame for us to part,  
     Nobody said it was easy.  
     Noone ever said it would be so hard.  
     I’m going back to the start.  

Instrumental: ***F | Bb | F | F***  
              ***Dm7 | Bb | F | F***  } 4 times  
              ***Dm7 | Bb | F***<!--n:The Scientist:s:12292:e:2434-->

      H | H Hadd11 Hadd11 Hadd11  
      E6 | Emaj | H | Hsus4  

  ***H***  
Look at the stars,  
Look how they shine for you  
  ***Emaj***  
And everything you do.  
    ***H***  
Yeah, they were all yellow.  

  ***H***  
I came along,  
I wrote a song for you  
  ***Emaj***  
And all the things you do.  
  ***H***  
And it was called yellow.  

  ***H***  
So then  
I took my turn,  
  ***Emaj***  
Oh, what a thing to’ve done.  
  ***H   Hadd11   H**  
And it was all yellow.  

Chorus:  
    Your skin,  
    Oh, yeah, your skin and bones  
    Turn into something beautiful.  
    And you know, you know I love you so.  
    You know I love you so.  


  ***H***  
I swam across,  
I jumped across for you,  
  ***Emaj***  
Oh, what a thing to do  
  ***H***  
’Cause you were all yellow.  

  ***H***  
I drew a line,  
I drew a line for you,  
  ***Emaj***  
Oh, what a thing to do  
  ***H  Hadd11   H***  
And it was all yellow.  

Chorus:  
    Your skin,  
    Oh, yeah, your skin and bones  
    Turn into something beautiful.  
    And you know, for you I’d bleed myself dry,  
    For you I’d bleed myself dry.  


It’s true, look how they shine for you.  
      ***Emaj***  
Look how they shine for you.  
      ***H   Hadd11***  
Look how they shine for.  

Look how they shine for you,  
      ***Emaj  E***  
Look how they shine for you.  
      ***H***  
Look how they shine.  

Look at the stars, look how they shine for you  
      ***Emaj***  
And all the things that you do.<!--n:Yellow:s:14764:e:1966-->
<!----><!--2021-09-03 00:10:00-->
Call it magic,  
Call it true,  
I call it magic  
When I’m with you.  

And I just got broken,  
       ***A    E***  
Broken into two,  
Still I call it magic  
When I’m next to you.  

Chorus:  
         ***D***  
     And I don’t and I don’t and I don’t and I don’t,  
           ***D/A         E***  
     No, I don’t, it’s true,  
     No, I don’t, no, I don’t, no, I don’t, no, I don’t  
     Want anybody else but you.  

           ***D***  
     No, I don’t, no, I don’t, no, I don’t, no, I don’t,  
           ***D/A         E***  
     No, I don’t, it’s true,  
     No, I don’t, no, I don’t, no, I don’t, no, I don’t  
     Want anybody else but you.  

     ***A    E***  
   Oooh, ooh.  

Call it magic,  
Cut me into two,  
And with all your magic,  
I disappear from view.  

And I can’t get over,  
Can’t get over you,  
Still I call it magic,  
Such a precious jewel.  

Chorus:  
     And I don’t and I don’t and I don’t and I don’t,  
     No, I don’t, it’s true,  
     No, I don’t, no, I don’t, no, I don’t, no, I don’t  
     Want anybody else but you.  

     No, I don’t, no, I don’t, no, I don’t, no, I don’t,  
     No, I don’t, it’s true,  
     No, I don’t, no, I don’t, no, I don’t, no, I don’t  
     Want anybody else but you.  

         ***D***  
   Wanna fall, oh,  
   Fall so far,  
         ***D***  
   I wanna fall,  
   Fall so hard,  
         ***D***  
   And I call it magic,  
      ***A       E***  
   And I call it true,  
     ***D            A E***  
   Call it ma, ma, ma, magic.  

   Oooh, ooh.  
     ***A        E***  
   Oooh, ooh.  
   Oooh, ooh.  
     ***A        E***  
   Oooh, ooh.  

And if you were to ask me,  
 ***A          E***  
After all that we’ve been through,  
Still believe in magic?  
 ***A      E***  
Yes, I do,  
Yes, I do,  
 ***A      E***  
Yes, I do,  
Yes, I do,  
   ***A        E***  
Of course I do.<!--n:Magic:s:16761:e:2639-->
<!----><!--2021-09-03 00:10:00-->
Intro: ***Am7 | Am7 | Dm Am7sus4 | Dm G6***  } 3 times  
  
       ***Am7***  
    Once upon a time somebody ran,  
        ***C                Dm***  
    Somebody ran away saying as fast as I can.  
    I got to go,  
      ***Am7sus4***  
    I got to go…  
  
    Once upon a time we fell apart  
    You’re holding in your hands the two halves of my heart.  
    Oh-oh-oh,  
    Oh-oh-oh-oh.  
  
    Instrumental: ***Am7 | C | Dm | Fmaj***  } 2 times  
  
    Once upon a time, we’re burning bright,  
    Now all we ever seemed to do is fight  
    On and on  
    And on and on and on.  
  
    Once upon a time on the same side,  
    Once upon a time on the same side in the same game  
    And why’d you have to go,  
    Have to go and throw it all in my face?  
  
               ***C***  
         I could’ve been a princess, you’d be a king,  
         Could’ve had a castle and worn a ring,  
              ***Fmaj***  
         But no, you let me go.  
  
              ***C***  
         I could’ve been a princess, you’d be a king,  
         Could’ve had a castle and worn a ring,  
             ***Fmaj***  
         But no, you let me go.  
  
               ***Dm***  
       You stole my star.  
                ***G***  
       Lah-lah-lah-lah-lah-lah-lah.  
                ***Am***  
       Lah-lah-lah-lah-lah-lah-lah.  
                ***Fmaj***  
       Lah-lah-lah-lah-lah.  
  
             ***Dm***  
       You stole my star.  
             ***Fmaj***  
       Lah-lah-lah-lah-lah-lah-lah.  
  
    Instrumental: ***Am7 | Am7 | Dm Am7sus4 | Dm G6***  } 2 times

    ’Cause you really hurt me.  
        ***Am          C***

<!----><!--2021-09-03 00:10:00-->
Intro: Db | Absus4/Eb | Ab | Fm  } 2 times  

    ***Db       Absus4/Eb***  
I used to rule the world,  
    ***Ab         Fm***  
Seas would rise when I gave the word.  
    ***Db     Absus4/Eb***  
Now in the morning I sweep alone,  
      ***Ab       Fm   Db Absus4/Eb Ab Fm***  
Sweep the streets I used to own.  

I used to roll the dice,  
Feel the fear in my enemies eyes,  
Listen as the crowd would sing:  

One minute I held the key,  
Next the walls were closed on me  
And I discovered that my castles stand  
Upon pillars of sand, pillars of sand.  

Chorus:  
       ***Db             Ebsus4***  
     I hear Jerusalem bells are ringing,  
       ***Ab            Fm***  
     Roman Cavalry choirs are singing:  
       ***Db               Ebsus4***  
     "Be my mirror, my sword and shield,  
       ***Ab                Fm***  
     My missionaries in a foreign field".  

     ***Db                Ebsus4***  
   For some reason I can't explain,  
     ***Cm7                Fm***  
   Once you go, there was never,  
      ***Db     Ebsus4***  
   Never an honest word  
      ***Ab       Fm***  
   That was when I ruled the world.  

It was a wicked and wild wind  
Blew down the doors to let me in.  
Shattered windows and the sound of drums,  
People couldn't believe what I'd become.  

Revolutionaries wait  
For my head on a silver plate.  
Just a puppet on a lonely string,  
Oh who would ever want to be king?  

Chorus  

   For some reason I can't explain,  
   I know St. Peter won't call my name.  
   Never an honest word  
   That was when I ruled the world.  

Chorus  

   For some reason I can't explain,  
   I know St. Peter won't call my name.  
   Never an honest word  
   That was when I ruled the world.<!--n:Viva la vida:s:23297:e:2449-->

           F               C

          Bbadd9

           F                C

                      Csus4 C

Intro: ***Eb | Bbm | Bbm | Fm | Eb | Bbm | Bbm | Fm***  } 2 times  

***Eb                  Bbm4***  
Lights go out and I can't be saved,  
         ***Fm7***  
Tides that I tried to swim against.  
***Eb            Bbm4***  
Put me down upon my knees,  
            ***Fm7***  
Oh, I beg, I beg and plead. Singing;  

Come out with things unsaid.  
Shoot, an apple off my head.  
And the trouble that can't be named.  
The tiger's waiting to be tamed. Singing...  

 ***Eb Bbm Fm  Eb Bbm Fm***  
    You are... You are...  

Instrumental: ***Eb | Bbm7 | Bbm7 | Fm/Ab***  } 2 times  

Confusion that never stops,  
Closing walls and ticking clocks.  
Gonna come back and take you home,  
I could not stop the tune I know, singing.  

Come out upon my seas,  
Cursed missed opportunities.  
Am I a part of the cure?  
Or am I part of the disease, singing...  

    You are... You are...  
    You are... You are...  

Instrumental: ***Eb | Bbm7 | Bbm7 | Fm/Ab***  } 2 times  

 ***Eb Bbm7 Fm/Ab***  
    You are...  
 ***Eb Bbm7 Fm/Ab***  
    You are...  

Nothing else compares.  
Oh, no nothing else compares.  
       ***Db***  
Oh, nothing else compares.  

 ***Eb | Bbm | Bbm | Fm***  } 2 times  
 ***Eb | Bbm7 | Bbm7 | Fm/Ab***  } 2 times  

 ***Eb Bbm7 Fm/Ab***  
    You are...  
 ***Eb Bbm7 Fm/Ab***  
    You are...  

***Eb    Bbm7        Fm/Ab***  
Home, home where I want to go.  
Home, home where I want to go.  
Home, home where I want to go.  
Home, home where I want to go.  


Instrumental: ***Eb | Bbm7 | Bbm7 | Fm7***<!--n:Clocks:s:31942:e:2085-->
<!----><!--2021-09-03 00:10:00-->
Intro: A  

  ***Dsus2 Dsus2add11+  Dsus2   Dsus2add11+***  
I turn the music up, I got my records on,  
I shut the world outside until the lights come on.  
  ***Dsus2    Dsus2add11+      Dsus2     Dsus2add11+***  
Maybe the streets alight, maybe the trees are gone,  
I feel my heart start beating to my favourite song.  

   ***Dadd9     D              Dadd9    D***  
And all the kids they dance, all the kids all night  
      ***Asus4  A              Asus4  A***  
Until Monday morning feels another life,  
I turn the music up, I’m on a roll this time  
    ***Dmaj9***  
And heaven is in sight.  

Instrumental: ***A | Dadd9 | A | Dadd9***  } 2 times  

I turn the music up, I got my records on,  
From underneath the rubble sing a rebel song.  
Don’t wanna see another generation drop,  
I’d rather be a comma than a full stop.  

Maybe I’m in the black, maybe I’m on my knees,  
Maybe I’m in the gap between the two trapezes,  
But my heart is beating and my pulses start  
Cathedrals in my heart.  

  ***Dadd9***  
As we saw,  
Oh, this light  
I swear you,  
Emerge blinking into  
   ***Dsus2          Dsus2add11+***  
To tell me it’s alright.  

  ***Dadd9 D Dadd9***  
As we soar  
Walls,  
Every siren is a symphony  
And every tear’s a waterfall,  
     ***A***  
Is a waterfall.  

 ***Dsus2***  
Ooh,  
     ***A***  
Is a waterfall,  
   ***Dsus2***  
Oh-oh-oh,  
     ***A***  
Is a waterfall.  

    ***Dsus2***  
Every tear  
    ***A***  
Is a waterfall,  
    ***Dsus2***  
Oh, oh, oh.  

      ***Esus4         Dadd9***  
So you can hurt, hurt me bad.  
But still I’ll raise the flag.  

    ***Dadd9 A Dadd9***  
Uuh.  

   ***A Dadd9***  
It was a waterfall,  
   ***A Dadd9***  
A waterfall.  

Instrumental: ***Dsus2 Dsus2add11+ | Dsus2 Dsus2add11+ | Amaj9 A | Amaj9 Amaj***  } 4 times  

 ***Dadd9           A***  
Every tear, every tear,  
      ***Aadd9 Amaj***  
Every tear is a waterfall.  
   ***Dadd9           A***  
Every tear, every tear,  
     ***Aadd9 Amaj A***  
Every tear is a waterfall.<!--n:Every Teardrop is a Waterfall:s:34058:e:2732-->
<!----><!--2021-09-03 00:10:00-->
Intro: Gm | Gm | Gm | Gm | Gm F | Gm | Gm | Gm | Gm  
        Eb | Gm Bb | Eb | Gm Bb | Eb | Gm Bb | Eb | F  

 ***Eb            Gm     Bb          Eb       Gm Bb***  
Oh, brother I can't, I can't get through.  
          ***Eb             Gm***  
I've been trying hard to reach you  
  ***Bb       Eb                 F***  
'Cause I don't know what to do.  

  ***Eb            Gm    Bb           Eb    Gm Bb***  
Oh, brother I can't believe it's true.  
       ***Eb               Gm***  
I'm so scared about the future  
  ***Bb    Eb              F***  
And I want to talk to you.  
  ***Eb              F    Gm***  
Oh, I want to talk to you.  

        ***Eb          Gm7           Bb   Eb Gm7 Bb***  
     You could take a picture of something you see.  
        ***Eb          Gm7           Bb  Eb Gm7 Bb***  
     In the future where will I be?  
        ***Eb             Gm7       Bb  Eb Gm7 Bb***  
     You could climb a ladder up to the sun  
        ***Eb             Gm7      Bb***  
     Or write a song nobody had sung  
        ***Eb             F             Gm7***  
     Or do something that's never been done.  

Are you lost or incomplete?  
Do you feel like a puzzle,  
You can't find your missing piece.  

  ***Eb      Gm    Bb Eb Gm Bb***  
Tell me how you feel.  
  ***Eb                Gm***  
Well, I feel like they're talking  
  ***Bb   Eb               F***  
In a language I don't speak.  
      ***Eb            F   Gm***  
And they're talking it to me.  

     So you take a picture of something you see.  
     In the future where will I be?  
     You could climb a ladder up to the sun  
     Or a write a song nobody had sung  
        ***Eb                  F***  
     Or do something that's never been done.  
        ***Eb       F       Gm7***  
     Do something that's never been done.  

     So you don't know where you're going and you want to talk.  
     And you feel like you're going where you've been before.  
     You'll tell anyone who'll listen but you feel ignored.  
     Nothing's really making any sense at all.  
          ***Eb          F***  
     Let's talk, let's talk.  
          ***Ebmaj       F     Gm***  
     Let's talk, let's talk.<!--n:Talk:s:36844:e:3471-->
<!----><!--2025-12-21 22:12:35--><!--cover:-->Британская рок-группа, начавшая играть в конце 90-х гг. прошлого века.<!--n:about:s:40344:e:10160-->
